description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a test job that uses the node:alpine image, runs "yarn" in before_script to install dependencies, then executes "yarn coverage" and captures coverage using the regex /All files[^|]*\|[^|]*\s+([\d\.]+)/. In the build stage add a build job that runs only on the master branch, uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, defines IMAGE_TAG as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE, logs in to registry.gitlab.com with "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com", builds the image with "docker build -t $IMAGE_TAG ." and pushes it with "docker push $IMAGE_TAG".
